title: Design System: TUH Laboratory Stock Design System

body.purpose: Standard document text, cell descriptions, and paragraph contents.

label.purpose: Tabular numbers, barcodes, dates, and lot numbers.

shadows.name: active-glow
shadows.purpose: Glow overlay applied on focused inputs and active states.

motion.name: view-transition-duration
motion.purpose: Visual scale-and-crossfade transition using View Transitions API.

motion.name: hover-shine
motion.purpose: Diagonal light sheen sweep when hovering primary action items.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action button with diagonal hover shine effect.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #0E9587; color: #FFFFFF; font-family: 'Sarabun', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; padding: 10px 16px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; position: relative; overflow: hidden; transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.1s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #1FA090; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard alphanumeric code input with focused glow outline.
components.html: <input class="ds-input-field" type="text" placeholder="ระบุเลขล็อต..." value="LOT-12345" />
components.css: .ds-input-field { background: rgba(0, 30, 39, 0.6); color: #ECF7F4; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 14px; border: 1px solid rgba(112, 196, 180, 0.25); border-radius: 8px; padding: 10px 14px; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; } .ds-input-field:focus { border-color: #33A593; box-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(112, 196, 180, 0.28); }

narrative.overview: A high-density, high-readability user interface designed specifically for medical laboratory professionals operating under variable lighting conditions. The layout avoids decorative elements in favor of a clean, structured workspace resembling an official lab record book.

rules.name: The Contrast Rule
rules.body: Body text must have a minimum contrast ratio of 4.5:1 against the background.

rules.name: The Tabular Number Rule
rules.body: Tables and lists rendering lot IDs, transaction records, and numeric quantities must use IBM Plex Mono to align values vertically.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces do not float on heavy dropshadows. Shadows appear only on active states (hover) and modal overlays.

dos: Do use IBM Plex Mono for numeric columns
donts: Don't allow transaction changes that drive lots below zero
